_comment: iOS phantom EXPIRATION. event.expiration_at_ms is in the future (2000000000000 = May 2033), and after event 10 the profile's trial_end_date is also far in the future. Webhook should LOG the suspicion and return 200 with 'Ignored suspicious EXPIRATION' — NOT mark the user expired. Regression test for the bug that locked out real trialing users.
